name: eisenhower-matrix
description: Evaluations for eisenhower-matrix skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user is overwhelmed and needs to classify tasks by urgency and importance

prompts.input: 用艾森豪威尔矩阵帮我整理这些任务的优先级
I'm overwhelmed with too many tasks. Help me separate urgent from important
事情太多了，紧急和重要该怎么区分？需要做任务排序
prompts.reason: Chinese triggers: '事情太多' (overwhelmed) + '紧急重要' + '任务排序'

prompts.input: Apply the Eisenhower matrix to prioritize this project
我感觉一直在救火。怎样区分紧急和重要来改变这个局面？
prompts.reason: Chinese context: firefighting + urgent/important distinction needed

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for single-item decisions, impact-based prioritization, or deep analysis

prompts.input: I have one critical bug to fix right now
prompts.reason: Single item doesn't need matrix classification; use OODA for quick decision

prompts.input: 哪 20% 的功能贡献了最多价值？怎样优化？
Deep analysis of this system's architectural problems
prompts.reason: Architectural analysis should trigger systems-thinking or first-principles
